article_title: Executive Committee of Council Meeting — June 02, 2026

agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Playground Development Grant Program Spring 2026
agenda_briefs.summary: Council will consider approving the Playground Development Grant Program for Spring 2026. This proposed program would provide grants to help build or upgrade playgrounds in Burnaby. The decision is not final — Council is set to vote on the recommendation at an upcoming meeting.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
6.1
PLAYGROUND DEVELOPMENT GRANTS 2026
Purpose: To seek Council approval for the Playground Development Grant Program, Spring 2026 intake recommendation.
agenda_briefs.article_title: Executive Committee of Council Meeting Agenda — June 02, 2026

agenda_briefs.title: Council to vote on Sport Hosting Grant Program for Spring 2026
agenda_briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on approving the Sport Hosting Grant Program for the Spring 2026 intake. This proposed program would provide grants to local sports organizations that host events in Burnaby. If approved, the program would help cover costs for things like venue rental, equipment, and marketing. The goal is to attract more sporting events to the city, which can boost local business and tourism. Council will consider the recommendation at an upcoming meeting. The decision has not been made yet — this is a proposal up for approval.
agenda_briefs.action_required: No action needed from you right now. Watch for the council decision — if approved, local sports groups may apply for grants.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
6.2
SPORT HOSTING GRANT SPRING 2026 INTAKE
Purpose: To seek Council approval for Sport Hosting Grant Program, Spring 2026 intake recommendation.
agenda_briefs.article_title: Executive Committee of Council Meeting Agenda — June 02, 2026

agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: Lease extension for Pacific Assistance Dogs Society at 9048 Stormont
agenda_briefs.summary: Burnaby Council will consider approving a six-month extension of the transition phase in the lease agreement with Pacific Assistance Dogs Society (PADS) at 9048 Stormont Avenue. This is a proposed change to the existing lease — it has not been approved yet. If passed, it would give PADS more time to complete its move or transition at that location.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
6.3
LA AMENDMENT - 9048 STORMONT AVENUE
Purpose: To seek Council approval to amend the Lease Agreement (“LA”) with Pacific Assistance Dogs Society (“PADS”) to extend the Transition Phase for an additional six-month term at 9048 Stormont Avenue.
agenda_briefs.article_title: Executive Committee of Council Meeting Agenda — June 02, 2026

agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: Council to vote on 2025/2026 Community School Grant payment
agenda_briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on approving the 2025/2026 Community School Grant payment. This grant provides funding to local community schools for programs and services. The decision has not been made yet — it will be decided at an upcoming council meeting.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
6.4
COMMUNITY SCHOOL GRANT FUNDING 2025-2026
Purpose: To obtain Council approval to issue the 2025/2026 Community School Grant payment.
agenda_briefs.article_title: Executive Committee of Council Meeting Agenda — June 02, 2026

minutes_briefs.title: Council approved $10,475 in Playground Development Grants for Spring 2026
minutes_briefs.summary: Burnaby Council voted unanimously to approve $10,475 in Playground Development Grants for Spring 2026. The grants will be given out as outlined in a report dated June 2, 2026. This decision is final and the money has been approved for distribution.
minutes_briefs.source_body:
MOVED AND SECONDED
THAT the disbursement of the Playground Development Grants totaling
$10,475.00, as outlined in the report titled “Playground Development Grants
2026”, dated June 2, 2026, be approved.  
CARRIED UNANIMOUSLY
minutes_briefs.article_title: Executive Committee of Council Meeting Minutes — June 02, 2026

minutes_briefs.title: Council approved up to $27,000 in Sport Hosting Grants for Spring 2026
minutes_briefs.summary: Burnaby Council unanimously approved the disbursement of up to $27,000 in Sport Hosting Grants for the Spring 2026 intake. This means local sports organizations that applied for funding to host events in spring 2026 will receive the money as outlined in the report. The decision is final and the grants are now approved for distribution.
minutes_briefs.action_required: If you applied for a Spring 2026 Sport Hosting Grant, check your application details and prepare to use the funds as outlined in your agreement.

key_dates.label: Spring 2026 Sport Hosting Grant funds available

minutes_briefs.source_body:
MOVED AND SECONDED
THAT the disbursement of the Sport Hosting Grant totaling up to $27,000 for the
Spring 2026 intake, as outlined in Attachment 1 of the report titled “Sport Hosting
Grant Spring 2026 Intake”, dated June 2, 2026, be approved.  
CARRIED UNANIMOUSLY
minutes_briefs.article_title: Executive Committee of Council Meeting Minutes — June 02, 2026

minutes_briefs.title: Council approved below-market lease extension for PADS at 9048 Stormont Ave
minutes_briefs.summary: Burnaby Council voted unanimously to extend the below-market rental rate of $1,000 per month (plus GST) for PADS at 9048 Stormont Avenue for an additional six months, from July 1, 2026 to December 31, 2026. Council also directed staff to report back with a policy on how market-rate rent would be phased in over time for non-profit groups. This decision is final and the lease amendment has been authorized.
minutes_briefs.action_required: If you are a non-profit tenant with a below-market lease, watch for the upcoming staff report on phased market-rate rent policies.

key_dates.label: Below-market lease extension for PADS takes effect
Below-market lease extension for PADS expires

minutes_briefs.source_body:
MOVED AND SECONDED
THAT staff report back with the policy on how the market rate would be phased in
over time for non-profit groups.
THAT the Lands and Facilities Department be authorized to amend the Lease
Agreement with PADS at 9048 Stormont Avenue to extend the below-market
rental rate of $1,000 per month, plus applicable GST, for an additional six-month
period commencing July 1, 2026, and expiring December 31, 2026, as outlined in
the report titled “LA Amendment – 9048 Stormont Avenue”, dated June 2, 2026.
CARRIED UNANIMOUSLY
minutes_briefs.article_title: Executive Committee of Council Meeting Minutes — June 02, 2026

minutes_briefs.title: Council approved $618,970 Community School Grant for 2025-2026
minutes_briefs.summary: Burnaby Council unanimously approved a $618,970 Community School Grant payment for the 2025-2026 school year. This grant provides funding to local community schools for programs and services that benefit Burnaby residents. The decision was made at a council meeting and is now final.
minutes_briefs.source_body:
MOVED AND SECONDED
THAT the payment of the 2025/2026 Community School Grant in the amount of
$618,970, as outlined in the report titled “Community School Grant Funding
2025/2026” dated June 2, 2026, be approved.
CARRIED UNANIMOUSLY
minutes_briefs.article_title: Executive Committee of Council Meeting Minutes — June 02, 2026
